headline: Adidas stock boosted after record-breaking London Marathon win
summary: Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Brooke DiPalma joins Market Domination to discuss Adidas' (ADDYY) stock jump following Sebastian Sawe's history-making victory in the 2026 London Marathon. Sawe became the first person to break the two-hour barrier in an official race with a world-record time of 1:59:30.

raw.headline: Adidas stock boosted after record-breaking London Marathon win
raw.summary: Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Brooke DiPalma joins Market Domination to discuss Adidas' (ADDYY) stock jump following Sebastian Sawe's history-making victory in the 2026 London Marathon. Sawe became the first person to break the two-hour barrier in an official race with a world-record time of 1:59:30.

headline: Nike’s Wholesale Rebound Clashes With Under Armour’s Footwear Freefall
summary: Nike (NYSE:NKE) and Under Armour (NYSE:UAA) both just closed quarters that investors are reading as turnaround checkpoints. Nike posted a $0.35 EPS result on $11.28 billion in sales, its fourth straight beat. Under Armour delivered $0.09 adjusted EPS on $1.33 billion. Both founders-era CEOs are running comebacks. Only one has scale on its side. Wholesale ... Nike’s Wholesale Rebound Clashes With Under Armour’s Footwear Freefall

headline: Adidas beats Nike in London: Sabastian Sawe smashes sub-2-hour mark
summary: Morning Brief Host Julie Hyman and Yahoo Finance Head of News Myles Udland discuss Sabastian Sawe’s historic sub-two-hour marathon. Adidas secures a major brand victory over Nike, signaling a potential shift in the competitive 'supershoe' market.

raw.headline: Adidas beats Nike in London: Sabastian Sawe smashes sub-2-hour mark

headline: Adidas shares rise after 'supershoe' helps seal sub-two hour marathon win
summary: STORY: Adidas shares rose on Monday (April 27) the day after a historic racing win.Investors bought in after Kenya's Sabastian Sawe became the first person to run a marathon in under two hours in an official race.He won the London Marathon wearing Adidas' Adizero Adios Pro Evo 3 trainers.Sawe finished the race in one hour 59 minutes and 30 seconds.The sub‑two‑hour marathon has been one of sport's biggest goals for years.Ethiopia's Yomif Kejelcha finished second in his marathon debut on Sunday.While Tigst Assefa broke her own women-only world record.All three were wearing the same make of Adidas trainers, which are due to go on sale on Thursday for a reported $500.The win is a boost for Adidas against arch-rival Nike.It comes after years of lab‑backed experiments and near‑misses looking to build a so-called "supershoe" to break the record.Nike's Breaking2 attempt at Monza in 2017 just fell short.Although Kenyan great Eliud Kipchoge ran under two hours in INEOS's 1:59 Challenge two years later.But those efforts fell outside the sport's official record books.Adidas said the Pro Evo 3 weighs an average 30% less than its predecessor and improves running economy by 1.6%.Adidas shares were up 2% in mid-morning trade, although they're down close to a fifth since the start of this year.That's due to concerns about the group's exposure to U.S. tariffs and the impact of the Middle East conflict.

raw.headline: Adidas shares rise after 'supershoe' helps seal sub-two hour marathon win
raw.summary: STORY: Adidas shares rose on Monday (April 27) the day after a historic racing win.Investors bought in after Kenya's Sabastian Sawe became the first person to run a marathon in under two hours in an official race.He won the London Marathon wearing Adidas' Adizero Adios Pro Evo 3 trainers.Sawe finished the race in one hour 59 minutes and 30 seconds.The sub‑two‑hour marathon has been one of sport's biggest goals for years.Ethiopia's Yomif Kejelcha finished second in his marathon debut on Sunday.While Tigst Assefa broke her own women-only world record.All three were wearing the same make of Adidas trainers, which are due to go on sale on Thursday for a reported $500.The win is a boost for Adidas against arch-rival Nike.It comes after years of lab‑backed experiments and near‑misses looking to build a so-called "supershoe" to break the record.Nike's Breaking2 attempt at Monza in 2017 just fell short.Although Kenyan great Eliud Kipchoge ran under two hours in INEOS's 1:59 Challenge two years later.But those efforts fell outside the sport's official record books.Adidas said the Pro Evo 3 weighs an average 30% less than its predecessor and improves running economy by 1.6%.Adidas shares were up 2% in mid-morning trade, although they're down close to a fifth since the start of this year.That's due to concerns about the group's exposure to U.S. tariffs and the impact of the Middle East conflict.

headline: Adidas shares rise after London Marathon winner breaks two-hour barrier
summary: Shares in Adidas rose in opening trade following Sunday's London Marathon, in which winner Sabastian Sawe broke a world record with a sub-two hour marathon run in a competitive race wearing the brand's trainers.

raw.headline: Adidas shares rise after London Marathon winner breaks two-hour barrier
raw.summary: Shares in Adidas rose in opening trade following Sunday's London Marathon, in which winner Sabastian Sawe broke a world record with a sub-two hour marathon run in a competitive race wearing the brand's trainers.
